shots.narrative: Piped driver 310 yards down the center, perfect ball flight with a slight draw
8-iron from 150 yards, landed softly on the green 8 feet from the pin
Made the 8-foot birdie putt, perfect start to the round
3-wood off the tee 260 yards, high draw staying in the fairway
Pitching wedge from 110 yards, spun back to 6 feet from the pin
Drained the 6-footer for back-to-back birdies
7-iron tee shot on par 3, pure strike landing 12 feet from the pin
Burned the edge on the birdie putt, tapped in for par
Another perfect drive 305 yards, this one with a gentle fade finding the fairway
6-iron from 185 yards, struck it perfectly and landed 15 feet from the pin
Made the 15-foot birdie putt, rolling now
Absolutely bombed driver 315 yards, slight draw staying in the fairway
5-iron from 200 yards, pure strike landing on the green 18 feet from the pin
Two-putt from 18 feet for par, solid hole
4-iron tee shot on long par 3, high draw landing softly on the green 20 feet from the pin
Two-putt from 20 feet for par, good lag
Driver 300 yards, high draw finding the center of the fairway
7-iron from 170 yards, landed on the green 10 feet from the pin
Made the 10-footer for birdie, four under through seven
3-wood off the tee 250 yards, slight fade staying in the fairway
5-iron from 190 yards, pure strike landing 12 feet from the pin
Made the 12-footer for birdie, five under through eight
Best drive of the day 320 yards, absolutely piped down the center
9-iron from 140 yards, landed softly on the green 8 feet from the pin
Drained the 8-footer for birdie, six under on the front nine
Driver 305 yards, slight draw finding the fairway
6-iron from 180 yards, landed on the green 15 feet from the pin
Two-putt from 15 feet for par, solid start to the back nine
3-wood 265 yards, high draw staying in the fairway
8-iron from 155 yards, pure strike landing 8 feet from the pin
Made the 8-footer for birdie, seven under now
6-iron tee shot on par 3, high draw landing softly on the green 12 feet from the pin
Made the 12-footer for birdie, eight under and feeling it
Driver 295 yards, slight fade but found the fairway
7-iron from 170 yards, landed on the green 20 feet from the pin
Two-putt from 20 feet for par, solid hole
Driver 310 yards, perfect draw down the center
7-iron from 165 yards, pure strike landing 10 feet from the pin
Made the 10-footer for birdie, nine under through fourteen
3-wood 255 yards, high draw staying in the fairway
4-iron from 205 yards, struck it perfectly and landed 15 feet from the pin
Two-putt from 15 feet for par, still nine under
Driver 300 yards, slight fade finding the fairway
9-iron from 135 yards, landed softly on the green 6 feet from the pin
Drained the 6-footer for birdie, ten under now
5-iron tee shot on par 3, high draw landing softly on the green 15 feet from the pin
Two-putt from 15 feet for par, solid on a tough hole
Absolutely piped driver 315 yards, best of the day down the center
7-iron from 165 yards, pure strike landing 12 feet from the pin
Made the 12-footer for birdie, eleven under par to close out the round of a lifetime
